# Tenant Context Placeholder Rules

Project: MOGHARE360 ERP
Mission: Mission 7
Document Type: Tenant Context Placeholder Rules
Scope: Design Documentation Only

## Tenant Status
Tenant is not operational yet.

## Current Runtime
Current local runtime:

http://localhost:8080/moghare360/

Current local folder naming:

moghare360

## Future Branding
Future product/brand naming can support:

moghareh360

## Tenant Rules for Mission 7
Mission 7 does not implement tenant isolation.

Mission 7 does not modify:
- tenant tables
- tenant logic
- tenant routing
- tenant authentication
- tenant permissions

## Placeholder Purpose
Tenant Context placeholder rules exist only to prevent future Auth Context from becoming tenant-unsafe.

## Mission 7 Boundary
No tenant table modification.
No tenant isolation implementation.
Documentation only.
